title: The Quiet Mind
subtitle: Final Boss: Survive the stillness windows.

ruleCard.hint: Survive the stillness windows. The Quiet Mind attacks when you move.

boss.introText: The final signal is silence. The Quiet Mind awaits.
boss.outroText: In the end, the monkey found what it sought: not answers, but peace.

copyLayers.ruleCard: Survive the stillness windows. The Quiet Mind attacks when you move.
copyLayers.codexSnippet: The Quiet Mind is not an enemy. It is the final lesson: that peace is found not in fighting, but in stillness.
copyLayers.radioWhisper: The last caller never spoke. Just breathed. Then the line went dead.
